title: 'Haley voters for Harris' ignore Nikki Haley's warning letter after she knocks group
shortDescription: The PAC rejected Haley's demands that it stop using her name to advertise.

title: Kamala Harris says she's ‘ready’ to debate Donald Trump
shortDescription: Kamala Harris on Thursday reminded reporters Donald Trump agreed to a Sept. 10 debate with Joe Biden, and she's 'ready' to step in.

title: Prosecutors fight Trump's challenge to NY hush money conviction
shortDescription: Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg defended the 34 guilty verdicts against former President Donald Trump after the Supreme Court's presidential immunity ruling.

title: Former AG Barr cleared in publicizing discarded ballots: watchdog
shortDescription: Former Attorney General Bill Barr was cleared of misconduct in helping publicize nine discarded ballots in 2020, in inspector general probe.

title: Donald Trump leads Kamala Harris by 1 point in national poll
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump leads Vice President Kamala Harris by one point in a new national poll, less than a week after she launched her 2024 White House bid.

title: 'Nothingburger': Trump civil fraud judge won't recuse from $464M case
shortDescription: Judge Arthur Engoron said he won't recuse from former President Donald Trump's civil fraud case based on a "forced encounter" he had with a lawyer.

title: Could Harris bring back Democrats upset with Biden over war in Gaza?
shortDescription: The vice president could be closer to what a coalition of anti-Biden voters, angered over the Israel-Gaza war, are looking for in 2024.

title: Image of Trump at golf course predates rally shooting | Fact check
shortDescription: Golfer Bryson DeChambeau, who posted the video the image came from, said it was recorded during the first week of July.

title: Trump calls Harris a 'lunatic' in first rally since Biden's exit
shortDescription: Donald Trump called presumptive Democratic presidential nominee Kamala Harris a "lunatic" and a "liar" at his first rally since Biden's exit from the race.

title: Congress acted legally to create presidential term limits | Fact check
shortDescription: Congress didn't violate the Constitution in starting the process of creating term limits. The change was approved by states as required.

title: Es falso que Biden está en cuidados paliativos | Hechos
shortDescription: El Presidente Joe Biden sigue desempeñando sus funciones tras sufrir de COVID-19, según su médico en la Casa Blanca.

title: False claim Biden is in hospice care | Fact check
shortDescription: President Joe Biden continues to perform presidential duties following a bout with COVID-19, according to his White House physician.

title: Biden leaves to Harris the race he wanted to run | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Investigation into shooter's motive in assassination attempt of former President Donald Trump. | Israel's Prime Minister speaks to Congress.

title: Biden has consistently left seal off campaign material | Fact check
shortDescription: There is nothing unusual about the seal not appearing on Biden's withdrawal letter. It has consistently been left off letters from his campaign.

title: Post misrepresents 2021 image of Capitol fence as new | Fact check
shortDescription: The post's image shows the fence placed around the Capitol following the Jan. 6 riots, not the one put up before Netanyahu's address.

title: Congress members raise flag after DC protests
shortDescription: Congress members raised an American flag in Washington D.C. after thousands protested Israeli Prime Minister Netenyahu's speech to Congress.

title: GOP escalates probe of flubbed FAFSA rollout
shortDescription: Congressional Republicans escalated a federal inquiry into college financial aid on Thursday by issuing a subpoena to the U.S. Education Department.

title: In her first campaign video, Harris touts freedom and slams Trump
shortDescription: In her first presidential campaign video, Kamala Harris attacks Trump for seeking chaos and emphasizes she will defend American freedom if elected.
